name: folds
description: Real 51Folds API integration — refines a thesis using brain context, submits to api.51folds.ai, polls for completion, and ingests model results back into the brain as a new source wired to relevant concepts. Lean v1: dud detection and monitor view tracked as deferred GitHub issues.

tools.name: refine_thesis
tools.description: Pull brain context relevant to a thesis; return the structured payload Claude refines with the user before submission. Registered as prism_folds_refine_thesis.

tools.name: create
tools.description: Submit a refined thesis to the 51Folds API and register the model in prism-brain.db. Registered as prism_folds_create.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Poll the platform for one or all registered prediction models. Registered as prism_folds_status.

tools.name: ingest_results
tools.description: Fetch completed results, ingest the narrative as a brain source, wire edges to related concepts. Registered as prism_folds_ingest_results.

PRISM_FOLDS_API_TOKEN.description: Bearer token for the 51Folds API. See .env.example.
